requirements: File 'extract_audio_for_macwhisper.sh' has been successfully renamed to 'extract_audio.sh'
Ensure the file 'extract_audio.sh' ends with a newline character (POSIX requirement)

output_examples.name: File Renaming Example
output_examples.description: Example of how to rename a file in a Git repository
output_examples.content:
# To rename a file in Git:
git mv old_filename.sh new_filename.sh

# This ensures Git tracks the rename operation properly
# rather than seeing it as a file deletion and creation

output_examples.name: POSIX Newline Check
output_examples.description: Script to check if files end with a newline character
output_examples.content:
# Check if a file ends with a newline
check_newline() {
  if [ -n "$(tail -c1 "$1")" ]; then
    echo "File $1 is missing a newline at the end"
    return 1
  fi
  return 0
}

# Ensure the file ends with a newline
ensure_newline() {
  if [ -n "$(tail -c1 "$1")" ]; then
    echo >> "$1"
    echo "Added newline to $1"
  fi
}
